en: Are you swallowing them whole? You're eating them so fast, are they even touching your tongue?
ko: 통째로 삼키는 거야? 너무 빨리 먹는데, 혀에 닿기는 해?

en: They are. Why aren't you having any, Angela?
ko: 닿아. 앤젤라, 넌 왜 안 먹어?

en: Oh, I ate so many already when no one was looking.
ko: 아, 아무도 안 볼 때 이미 많이 먹었어.

en: Yeah, right. My baby's dieting.
ko: 그래, 맞아. 내 자기가 다이어트 중이야.

en: She wants to fit into a special child-sized wedding gown for her big day.
ko: 결혼식 날 특별한 아동용 웨딩드레스를 입고 싶대.

en: Why do those exist? It's from my pageant days.
ko: 그런 게 왜 있어? 내 미인대회 시절 거야.

en: I was Miss Tiny Mid-Atlantic Bride when I was ten.
ko: 10살 때 미스 타이니 미드아틀란틱 신부였거든.

en: You've probably heard of it. Brownies, is it?
ko: 아마 들어봤을 걸. 브라우니야?

en: Pastry cubes made of sugar and fat? No, thank you. I'll stick with my jerky.
ko: 설탕이랑 지방으로 만든 과자? 됐어. 난 육포 먹을게.

en: So why'd you come in here? To socialize and inform.
ko: 그럼 왜 여기 온 거야? 사교하고 정보 전달하려고.

en: Ooh, brownies!
ko: 오, 브라우니!

en: I'm taking two so I can parcel them up and eat them at my leisure later on.
ko: 두 개 가져갈게, 싸서 나중에 천천히 먹으려고.

en: Much healthier. You're taking two? Yeah, um, but one of them is for Tibby.
ko: 훨씬 건강하지. 두 개 가져가? 응, 음, 근데 하나는 티비 거야.

en: Yeah, why don't you send that to him in Costa Rica?
ko: 그래, 코스타리카에 있는 그한테 보내지 그래?

en: Um, I'm just going to hand it to him right now.
ko: 음, 지금 바로 직접 줄 거야.

en: Okay, weirdo. Why is that weird?
ko: 좋아, 이상한 사람. 그게 왜 이상해?

en: She said she was going to give it to him right now. She's probably going to because they sit next to each other.
ko: 지금 바로 줄 거라고 했어. 옆에 앉으니까 당연히 그럴 거야.

en: Yeah, they used to. Toby works here again.
ko: 그래, 전에는 그랬지. 토비가 다시 여기서 일해.

en: Oh, can you imagine? Oh no, you don't know.
ko: 오, 상상이 돼? 아, 모르는구나.

en: I don't know. What? You should probably just meander back there.
ko: 모르지. 뭘? 슬슬 뒤쪽으로 가봐.

en: Take a look, see if he's back. Dare I?
ko: 한번 봐, 돌아왔나. 감히?

en: You know what, I'm going to. For old time's sake.
ko: 있잖아, 가볼게. 옛날 생각해서.

en: Great practical joke, Jim. Got me to go to the annex.
ko: 짐, 좋은 장난이야. 별관까지 가게 만들었네.

en: No! God! No! God! Please, no!
ko: 안 돼! 세상에! 안 돼! 세상에! 제발, 안 돼!

en: No! No! No!
ko: 안 돼! 안 돼! 안 돼!
